entries.condition: APOE4 — Alzheimer's disease, cardiovascular risk, lipid metabolism
entries.evidenceLevel: Definitive / largest effect common variant for AD
entries.notes: Combined with rs7412 determines APOE genotype. e4 = increased AD risk, higher LDL. e2 = protective for AD.
TT=e2 allele (protective). CC=e3 or e4 (combine with rs429358).
Clopidogrel (Plavix) may be ineffective. FDA boxed warning.
Loss of function. Common in East Asian populations.
Reduced warfarin clearance; lower dose needed. Also affects losartan, celecoxib.

entries.condition: CYP2C9*3 — warfarin sensitivity, NSAID toxicity risk
entries.notes: Significantly reduced enzyme activity. Warfarin dose reduction critical.
Even heterozygous carriers at severe/fatal risk from 5-FU. Pre-treatment testing now standard in EU.
Dose reduction or alternative agent required.

entries.condition: Factor V Leiden — venous thromboembolism, DVT, PE
entries.notes: R506Q. Most common hereditary thrombophilia in Europeans. Estrogen contraindication.
Homozygous = hereditary hemochromatosis. Regular phlebotomy needed. Check ferritin/transferrin sat.
Mandatory pre-prescription test. Abacavir can cause fatal hypersensitivity.
Allopurinol can cause Stevens-Johnson syndrome. Test before prescribing.
Most common genetic cause of familial PD. LRRK2 inhibitors in trials.
FDA label. CC = 18x risk of myopathy on simvastatin. Consider rosuvastatin.
Homozygous = fatal myelosuppression on standard thiopurine doses.
Combined with *3C = TPMT*3A, most common deficiency allele.
Strongest AF locus. PITX2 is critical for left atrial development.
Strongest psoriasis locus. IL-17/23 pathway therapies.
Most replicated CAD locus. Independent of traditional risk factors.
In LD with other 9p21 SNPs. Cumulative effect.
Glu504Lys. A allele = flushing, acetaldehyde toxicity, esophageal cancer risk. Common in East Asians.
A69S. Second strongest AMD locus. Smoking interaction.

entries.condition: Age-related macular degeneration — complement factor H
entries.notes: Y402H. Strongest AMD locus. Complement-mediated inflammation.
Slow metabolizer. Efavirenz CNS toxicity risk. Bupropion levels elevated.
Increased metabolism; clopidogrel enhanced, omeprazole may need higher dose.
Part of CYP2D6 star allele determination.

entries.condition: G6PD deficiency (A- variant) — hemolytic anemia, drug sensitivity
entries.notes: V68M. Primaquine, dapsone, fava bean sensitivity. Males fully affected.
HLA-B27 tag SNP. AS, reactive arthritis, anterior uveitis.
DQ2.5 haplotype. 95% of celiacs carry DQ2 or DQ8.
Part of HLA class II region.
HLA-DRB1 shared epitope tag SNP. Strongest RA genetic factor.
Strongest MS genetic risk factor. Tag SNP for DR15.

entries.condition: Elevated Lp(a) — cardiovascular risk, aortic stenosis
entries.notes: Each G allele strongly raises Lp(a). Lp(a) test essential. Pelacarsen in trials.
Less common but strong effect. Lp(a) measurement indicated.

entries.condition: MTHFR C677T — folate metabolism, homocysteine, neural tube defect risk, methotrexate
entries.notes: TT = 70% reduced enzyme activity. Elevated homocysteine. Supplement methylfolate.

entries.condition: NAT2 slow acetylator — isoniazid toxicity, sulfonamide sensitivity
entries.notes: Slow acetylators at risk of isoniazid hepatotoxicity, bladder cancer from arylamines.
1007fs. Most studied Crohn's variant. Innate immunity.
I148M. Strongest genetic risk factor for fatty liver, NASH, cirrhosis, HCC. GG = very high risk.
Near LPA gene. Lp(a) testing recommended.
Affects beta-cell function and incretin signaling. TT = ~1.9x risk.
Rare but severe impact on thiopurine metabolism.
Proxy for UGT1A1*28. TT = Gilbert syndrome, irinotecan dose reduction.
G71R. More common in East Asian populations.
AA = low dose warfarin needed. Combined with CYP2C9 for dosing.
In LD with rs9923231. TT associated with low-dose warfarin requirement.
MYC enhancer variant. One of most replicated cancer SNPs.
Q141K. Reduced urate excretion. Allopurinol response modifier.

entries.condition: ABO blood type — non-O increases VTE/CAD risk
entries.notes: Non-O blood type increases vWF/FVIII levels.
ACE I/D proxy. DD associated with higher ACE activity.
Gly460Trp. Increased renal sodium reabsorption. Respond to thiazides.
Arg48His. Rapid ethanol→acetaldehyde. Protective against alcohol use disorder.

entries.condition: DRD2 Taq1A — dopamine receptor density, addiction risk, reward processing
entries.notes: A1 allele = reduced D2 receptor density. Addiction vulnerability, ADHD. L-DOPA response.
DAO activity. Affects histamine clearance from gut.
T300A. Impaired autophagy of intracellular bacteria.

entries.condition: BDNF Val66Met — depression, anxiety, memory, neuroplasticity
entries.notes: Met allele = reduced activity-dependent BDNF secretion. Affects hippocampal volume, exercise benefits.
Second strongest AD locus after APOE. Endocytosis/tau pathology.
Truncating variant with moderate cancer risk.
Cell cycle regulation in beta cells.

entries.condition: Nicotine dependence / lung cancer — cholinergic receptor
entries.notes: 15q25. Nicotinic receptor. Affects smoking behavior and lung cancer risk.
Sp1 binding site. Affects collagen expression. Bone density.

entries.condition: COMT Val158Met — catecholamine metabolism, pain sensitivity, psychiatric traits, stimulant response
entries.notes: Met/Met = slower dopamine clearance, better prefrontal cognition but more anxiety/pain sensitivity. Val/Val = warrior type.

entries.oddsRatio: 1.36 for MI if slow + high coffee
entries.notes: AC/CC = slow caffeine metabolizer. >3 cups/day may increase CVD risk.
CYP2R1 converts D3 to 25(OH)D. G allele = lower levels.

entries.condition: CYP4F2 V433M — warfarin dose increase needed
entries.notes: Reduced vitamin K metabolism; may need higher warfarin dose.

entries.condition: Coronary artery disease, abdominal aortic aneurysm

entries.notes: FGFR2 intron 2. One of strongest common BC variants.
Fibrinogen gamma chain. Affects fibrin clot structure.
FTO locus. Affects satiety signaling. ~3kg weight difference.

entries.condition: Obesity — fat mass and obesity associated

Lead FTO signal in some populations.
N126D. Common in African populations. Mild enzyme reduction.
Vitamin D binding protein variant. Lower 25(OH)D levels.

entries.condition: GSTP1 I105V — platinum chemotherapy response, oxidative stress
entries.notes: Affects glutathione conjugation. Modifies response to cisplatin/carboplatin.
Compound heterozygous C282Y/H63D = intermediate risk. H63D/H63D = mild risk.
Hepatocyte nuclear factor. Also renal cysts.

entries.condition: Type 2 diabetes — potassium channel, sulfonylurea response

entries.condition: Melanoma risk, red hair, fair skin

Key hypothalamic appetite regulator. Setmelanotide target.
C/C(GG) = lactose intolerant (ancestral). T allele = persistence (European adaptation).

entries.notes: Compound heterozygous with C677T increases homocysteine.

G22A. Associated with increased slow-wave sleep.
